work_completed: Created scripts/trafilatura_extract.py — Python bridge (stdin HTML → JSON {title, body, originalChars, cleanChars})
Trafilatura primary path: extract_metadata() for title, extract(include_tables=True) for body
Cheerio fallback: triggers when trafilatura body is empty, reads og:title via attr() not text()
TC-0.1 PASS: 구독트리 post, prices preserved, reductionRatio >= 0.6
TC-0.2 PASS: SharePlan noise post, 98% reduction (82,054 → 1,271 chars), reductionRatio >= 0.95
TC-0.3 PASS: 기프티콩~ implicit name post, titleText contains YouTube reference
TC-0.4 PASS: script-only body → trafilatura returns empty → Cheerio fallback, tool=cheerio, warning=trafilatura_empty_fallback_used
Sanity test PASS: Stage0Output shape always has required typed fields
work_remaining: Slice 2: Stage 1 - Classify (classifyPost, LLM, 5 post types) (3h)
Slice 3: Stage 2 - Filter (noise removal, signal score, contentForLlm) (4h)
Slice 4: Stage 3 - LLM Extract (extractWithLlm, implicit name resolution, Zod validation) (4h)
Slice 5: Stage 4 - Merge (vote/tie-breaker, catalog validation, source attribution) (4h)

Slice 8: Orchestrator + Adapter (orchestrator.ts, adapter.ts, migrate request-handler.ts) (4h)

decisions_made.decision: Async child_process.spawn (not execSync) for Python bridge
decisions_made.rationale: Timeout enforcement requires event loop; execSync blocks and cannot kill on timeout
decisions_made.impact: locateElements is async, all callers must await

decisions_made.decision: TC-0.4 trigger: script-only body HTML, not nav-only HTML
decisions_made.rationale: trafilatura with no_fallback=False extracts nav list text ('Home\nAbout'). Only script/style-only body reliably returns empty.
decisions_made.impact: Test HTML for fallback = <body><script>var d={}</script></body>, NOT <nav>...

decisions_made.decision: og:title via attr('content') not .text() in Cheerio fallback
decisions_made.rationale: meta element has no text content; og:title value is in content attribute
decisions_made.impact: Cheerio fallback title_selector for meta reads el.attr('content')
All stage modules live at lib/competitor-intel/pipeline/stage0-locate/ etc.
